items.name: Ruby Smili
items.description:
An imperfect, glowing artefact. Some cracks show themselves, and bits and pieces of gold and amethyst plague its skin...


Obtained by completing one of these tasks :
- Own at least 9 Smili gifts (and not gift ITEMS) not counting collab giftboxes
- Have spent at least 7k on nukes (before August)
- Own 199 Smilis
- Have spent in general 16k on Smili UGC (not counting resells)
- ???
PBR item! Use higher graphics for a shiny texture.
Based on Smili from the Smili comic!
Texture + extra help by Amm.
